labor_share.basis: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 541713 ($3,606,543,220) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 541713 ($56,906,009,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

n_band.basis: margin 0.1565 (margins.json[54]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Business & Consumer Services EBITDA/Sales 15.65%); revenue/employee $319,812 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 541713); class <5: 608 firms, avg revenue/firm $629,016 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $98,441 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 178 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,590,517 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $248,916 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 150 firms, avg revenue/firm $4,055,340 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $634,661 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 189 firms, avg revenue/firm $11,757,582 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,840,062 -> IN $1-10M band; class 100-499: 112 firms, avg revenue/firm $34,040,321 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $5,327,310 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 232 firms, avg revenue/firm $213,782,134 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $33,456,904 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 301
